metadata.description: v7.2: Route 1 - pure physical parameters (eps_su8=3.28, eps_teflon=1.934, d_su8=400nm, d_teflon=400nm) + A_eff=1.20 correction factor. Eliminates Teflon double-counting in old formula.
metadata.goal: 加入像素墙接触角效应，提高稳态精度
improvements: gamma: 0.048 -> 0.015 (effective macro surface tension from CV fit)

materials._comment_convection: Re≈1-5, Stage 3后期可设为true引入对流项u·∇u
materials._comment_materials: SU-8+Teflon+Oil+Polar 4-layer series equivalent epsilon_r=12.0. gamma=0.015 is effective macro surface tension from CV fitting. d=800nm is effective thickness. All calibrated from 501-C/D/E/F CV+RT data.
materials._comment_wall: 极性液体环境中:油墨亲疏水层(底部Teflon),不亲像素墙(亲水),油墨贴底收缩,20V以上翻墙
materials._comment_ac_interface: AC epsilon = 0.5um -> tanh transition ~1.4um, matching Teacher interface_width=1.5um. Crisp oil-water interface. NIST: epsilon << Lz(20um) satisfied (40x). EW source scaled 100x vs eps=5um, compensated by electrowetting_weight=0.02.
materials._comment_epsilon_r: epsilon_r=12.0 is device-level calibrated effective value (NOT material dielectric constant). For pure material params, use epsilon_su8=3.28 and epsilon_teflon=1.934 with A_eff=1.20 correction factor.
materials._comment_capacitance: Capacitance formula: C = A_eff / (d_su8/(eps0*eps_su8) + d_teflon/(eps0*eps_teflon)). A_eff absorbs fringe field, surface roughness, and pixel array effects.

aperture_mapping._comment: 开口率映射(真实材料参数后重新标定): η=η_max×tanh(k×Δθ/theta_scale); Δθ@30V≈11°(旧拟合值Δθ≈52°); k和theta_scale调大以补偿Δθ缩小

physics_mechanism._1_electrowetting: 电润湿作用在极性液体上，使其润湿疏水层(Teflon)
physics_mechanism._2_spreading: 极性液体铺展，将油墨从像素中心挤向边缘/角落
physics_mechanism._3_ink_behavior: 油墨亲疏水层(底部)，不亲围堰壁，贴底收缩形成液滴
physics_mechanism._4_aperture: 开口率 = 极性液体覆盖的透明区域面积 / 像素面积
physics_mechanism._5_overflow: 20V以上油墨被挤压到极限可能翻墙

geometry._comment_geometry: 像素内沿174μm, 油墨3-3.5μm, 围堰3.5μm(模型用20μm防翻墙)

data._comment_times: 时间采样点数（从20增加到50，解决10ms附近的异常突起）
data._comment_time_range: 与 Stage 2 PINN (pinn_two_phase.py) 的 t_max=0.05s 保持一致

dynamics_params._comment: tau=11.9ms avg from 501-C/D/E/F RT fitting (range 10.2-13.9). Rise slower than fall. 1st-order confirmed: all R2>0.93.
